name: Autodesk Fusion 360 MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Autodesk Fusion 360 — a cloud-based CAD/CAM/CAE platform for 3D design, simulation, and manufacturing. Enables AI agents to interact with Fusion 360 designs, query 3D model data, automate design workflows, and integrate AI into Fusion 360's design-to-manufacturing pipeline.
use_cases: Querying Fusion 360 3D model data from engineering analysis agents
Automating design workflows from product design agents
Generating design variations and modifications from AI design assistants
Integrating Fusion 360 with AI-driven manufacturing workflows
not_for: Teams using other CAD tools (AutoCAD, SolidWorks, FreeCAD)
Production manufacturing without proper engineering validation
best_when: A product designer or mechanical engineer using Fusion 360 wants AI agents to assist with 3D design automation — querying model data, applying design changes, and integrating AI into the Fusion 360 design workflow.
avoid_when: You use AutoCAD or other Autodesk products without Fusion 360. Community tool — not official Autodesk integration. Fusion 360 API can be complex.

auth.notes: Autodesk OAuth 2.0 required. Fusion 360 API access via Autodesk Forge/Platform Services credentials.

pricing.paid_tiers: Fusion 360 commercial subscription for professional use
pricing.notes: Fusion 360 personal use is free. Commercial use requires subscription. MCP server is free community tool.

performance.rate_limits: Autodesk API rate limits and Fusion 360 operation complexity

known_agent_gotchas: Fusion 360 API requires Autodesk Platform Services OAuth — setup is more complex than simple API key
3D model operations can be slow — implement generous timeouts for complex design operations
Design modifications directly affect Fusion 360 project data — use version control/history
Community tool — Autodesk Forge API changes may break MCP without notice
agent_readiness.security_notes: Autodesk OAuth. HTTPS to Autodesk cloud. Design IP stored in Autodesk cloud. Review Autodesk data policies for sensitive engineering data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Autodesk OAuth. Cloud-stored design IP. HTTPS. Review Autodesk data policies.
